item.title: Photoshop Censors Your Art Now
item.description: This week I learned Photoshop can slut-shame. I tried using Adobe's new Beta Tool Set on one of my photos and Photoshop immediately informed me that my image was too inappropriate to edit. Not upload. Not post. Edit. So I spent a video digging into Adobe's moderation system, testing what triggers it, and discovering that Photoshop may be judging my outfits harder than half the internet. Full Breakdown Video: https://youtu.be/sWcnBBrJ5cw
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Ukraine strikes Russian military electronics plant in Voronezh
item.description:
On June 22nd 2026 Ukraine struck the military-industrial enterprise VZPP, short for Voronezh Semiconductor Devices Plant, in Voronezh, capital of the Russian Voronezh Oblast. The attack hit during normal working hours, killing 5 people and wounding several dozen more according to the regional governor: https://www.reuters.com/world/europe/five-dead-after-attack-russias-voronezh-governor-says-2026-06-22/ The plant produced electronic components critical for various Russian missile systems that are being used in Russia's war against Ukraine, e.g. the Kh-101 cruise missile (used in an attack on the Okhmatdyt children's hospital in Kyiv), the 9K720 Iskander (responsible for the first Ukrainian losses of HIMARS and Patriot) and Pantsir anti-air missile systems (the backbone of Russia's missile-based air-defense against Ukrainian drones and cruise missiles): https://en.defence-ua.com/news/what_did_vzpp_plant_in_voronezh_do_before_ukrainian_cruise_missiles_hit_it_and_why_does_it_matter_for_kh_101_r_500-18899.html While Ukrainian press and Russian military official sources suggest that the weapon systems used in this attack were Storm Shadow cruise missiles, supplied to Ukraine by the UK and France, independent military analysts have pointed out that characteristics visible in the available video footage fit better to AGM-188 Rusty Dagger air-launched cruise missiles, a brand-new cruise missile by Zone 5 Technologies (of Norwegian company Kongsberg Gruppen) produced for the US Air Force. Zone 5 Technologies revealed in early June 2026 that Rusty Daggers, capable of being launched by F-16, have been supplied to Ukraine for field-testing: https://www.twz.com/air/kongsberg-bets-on-high-low-cruise-missile-mix-with-jsm-and-rusty-dagger
To add insult to injury: OSINT analysts identified Russian air defense as the cause of the now famous explosion at Moscow's oil refinery: https://theins.press/en/news/293893
Please consider donating to Ukraine using the official government website: https://u24.gov.ua/
item.dc:creator: DerpMeister

item.title: Disabled American's may no longer have homes...
item.description: https://x.com/theaisbarks/status/2069205038661042616?s=46 https://www.npr.org/2026/06/20/nx-s1-5865100/doj-memo-trump-disability-civil-rights-institutionalization https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/new-justice-department-memo-questions-decades-of-protections-for-people-with-disabilities From Twitter https://x.com/Gianl1974/status/2069087162528624820 A Justice Department lawyer just signed a memo saying disabled Americans have no right to live in their own homes. In the same document, she admits no court in the country agrees with her. Read that again. A government official wrote down, in black and white, that her own argument is wrong by every legal standard of the last thirty years, and she made it anyway. Here is what it means in plain terms. Right now, 8.4 million people get help that lets them stay in their own homes. Aides who help them dress. Care that lets them work, see friends, raise their kids, sleep in their own beds at night. This memo tells states they can cut all of it. And if they cut it, where do those people go? Into nursing homes. Into institutions. Into facilities where someone else decides when you wake up, what you eat, who your roommate is, whether you go outside today. A lawyer who has visited people locked in these places said their whole world shrinks to one hallway. That is the future this memo is opening the door to. Keeping people in their own homes is cheaper. In one case, home care cost under $7,500 a year. The nursing home would have cost close to $50,000. The cruel option is also the expensive one. They want to spend more money to make people's lives worse. So why? Because last summer Trump signed an order to deal with homelessness by force, by sweeping people off the streets and committing them. He said it out loud during the campaign: the mentally ill belong back in institutions. The only thing standing in the way was the law that says people deserve to live in their own communities. This memo is how they get around it. And it landed the same week Republicans slashed Medicaid, giving every cash-strapped state the perfect excuse to start cutting. A think tank drew up the plan. A lawyer wrote the memo. A president signed the order. Three signatures, and millions of people could lose the right to their own front door. We are about to spend the summer celebrating 250 years of American freedom. Some Americans are about to find out it doesn't include them.
item.dc:creator: Imadethisaccounttopost

item.title: Aussies to FIFA on Trump trophy presentation: Yeah, nah, absolutely fucking not.
item.description: Oh, cool. Fantastic. FIFA reportedly wants Donald Trump to present the World Cup trophy, and Australian soccer fans are treating that idea with the exact amount of dignity it deserves—which is to say, absolutely fucking none. Loud, beautifully profane, unadulterated beautiful chaos. ⚽ Think about it! You spend years training, bleeding, sweating through qualifiers just to have a guy whose athletic peak was yelling at meat on television hand you a trophy. Aussies looked at the US border mess, took one collective look at the G7 posture nonsense, and said "Yeah, nah, mate." Socceroos fans are practically screaming it: forcing international athletes to smile for a man who treats global diplomacy like a failed reality TV boardroom is a special brand of psychological torture. They didn’t travel halfway around the globe to be a background prop for a political stunt! It turns out you can’t threaten everyone with tariffs, insult your neighbors, drop tourism numbers off a cliff, and expect a stadium full of furious foreigners to cheer for you. International events require international goodwill, you absolute absolute weapons! #Socceroos #WorldCup2026 #YeahNah #FIFAWho #EmptySeatsEnergy #TheVesselScoldedAgain https://sports.yahoo.com/articles/australian-soccer-fans-anti-donald-185430787.html
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: A «lonely» Ukrainian housewife traded WhatsApp messages with a Chechen commander for months. "Send me a picture," she asked. He photographed himself and a map of his unit's position pinned on the wall behind him.
item.description: "She" was a middle-aged Ukrainian intelligence officer named Serhiy. Shortly after Achmad sent the photo, a drone struck the coordinates it revealed. His commander: "Serhiy was great at flirting. Guys in our team started asking him for dating advice." (symbolic picture)
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: My first lesbian relationship
item.description: This was my first lesbian relationship and first relationship in 20 years {19 of which, I was married). I'm devastated and heart broken. It had only been two weeks but they were an amazing two weeks. She made me feel beautiful and valued and sexy. Now I'm having doubts about all those things. Most Viral Edit: Thank you all so much! I kinda expected this to die in user sub lol. I appreciate all of your kind words and a special thank you to all the lesbians that have commented! I'm very new to lesbian relationships and I'm glad to know I'm not alone!
item.dc:creator: BaddieValentina

item.title: Phone-clearing dump 444
item.description:
I love all of these so much, like the one where a service bot got equipped (gaffa-taped) with a knife and renamed ‘stabby’ by the humans. Or the one where alien invaders are taken down by local wildlife.
Earlier that day……
I honestly don’t know where I got these (probably my smut group) but it made made me think of…:
Galaxy quest
Drawn Together
The Boys
The Legend. (I have no idea who this is tbh)
Someone’s haul from one of my book groups, that I meant to look in to. As always with any titles that show up in my posts - do check the descriptions and warnings first.
Ummmmmmm ok
I see a lot of post from the us about supplies for students and….is it really this grim?

item.description:
This is how it feels to be hungover
High in her tower she sits by the hour maintaining her hair. Blithe and becoming and frequently humming a light hearted air
Y’know I don’t think this is real. I was never consulted :(
This has to be my most repeated quote
I saw somebody call Ali Louis Bourzgui a hear me out. Are we fr that guy is hot as fuck. I love an ethnically ambiguous curly haired man. And don’t even get me started on when he’s in that blonde mullet wig. He’s a vampire for Christ’s sake
Gertie tax
Bruce helping me tax
Nessie tax

item.title: GovBrief Today #508
item.description: A federal judge ordered the government to shut down a voter database it built knowing it was illegal. The system started as a way to verify immigration status for government benefits, but the administration rebuilt it into a tool to hunt for noncitizens on the voter rolls. More than sixty million people were analyzed. Some were citizens. The fraud they were chasing turns up in 0.04% of voters. Records show the agencies understood the law and built the machine anyway, then kept it running while real citizens were purged from the rolls. A judge has stopped it for now, and the Trump administration insists it did nothing wrong. I've emailed 7,920 stories over 508 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260622-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june22b [2] https://go.govbrief.today/dinner-gunman-recusal [3] https://go.govbrief.today/walz-ellison-subpoenas [4] https://go.govbrief.today/candy-soda [5] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-saldano [6] https://go.govbrief.today/pool-arrests [7] https://go.govbrief.today/fraud-website [8] https://go.govbrief.today/planned-parenthood-funds [9] https://go.govbrief.today/fatal-tesla [10] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-lawn [11] https://go.govbrief.today/bipartisan-housing [12] https://go.govbrief.today/save-db-illegal Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
